title: Chiseled Lib
description: an Library created to help with development for the architektum workshop projects and to stop repeat creation of code
body:
### ![ChiseledLibBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0df52dbc37721efeafe8f277d8d8ee8e211c857.png)

## Chiseled Lib
chiseled lib is a library i made for [Architektum Workshop](https://modrinth.com/organization/architektum-workshop) to help with mod development and also to prevent us from repeatedly recoding the same thing for each project.

## Features

- EnchantmentUtils


- ItemHighlight Overlay


- RenderUtils(w.i.p)


- Screenshake


## Importent Information
  this mod will not be ported to forge or backported to older versions of minecraft unless needed.
  this mod is licensed under **ALL RIGHTS RESERVED** and you are not allowed to reuse its assets or code nor are you allowed to port/fork it to older versions or other modloaders, but you may put it in modpacks/servers or use it as a library in your own mods
